violations.text: Pickled veggies and tortillas observed from an unapproved source. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (beverages and prepackaged foods) in the 4 dr refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

(Various food product ) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024
